abilities.name: Forever Doomed
abilities.text: This model treats any black jokers it flips or cheats as red jokers.

abilities.name: Terrifying
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.text: This model is unaffected by severe and hazardous terrain.

actions.name: Ferocious Claws
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage. Move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Pouncing Strike
triggers.text: Place this model into base contact with a different enemy model within 5". Then, declare this action again, targeting that enemy model.

triggers.name: Bloody Fate
triggers.text: Draw a card. If the target was not killed, discard a card.

triggers.name: Mental Trauma
triggers.text: Target must either discard a card or be dealt 3 damage.

actions.name: Permafrost Breath
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain an Slow token.

triggers.name: Mark the Way
triggers.text: Make a Lamp marker within 2" of the target.

actions.name: Aggressive Leap
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range. Until the end of the current activation, it may not declare the Interact action.

triggers.name: Last Light
triggers.text: This model gains a Death token.
